library_preparation_preflight.summary: No extra setup is needed: maven-scm-provider-gitexe is a Maven SCM provider for the local git executable, and its required runtime libraries are already resolved transitively by the artifact. Meaningful coverage is reachable through command-line factory and output-consumer APIs without Docker, external services, or extra test dependencies.
library_preparation_preflight.agent_guidance: No environment variables or system properties are required. If tests execute real git commands instead of only command construction/consumer parsing, use temporary local repositories and configure git user.name/user.email locally in the test repository.
risks: Tests that perform real commits, tags, pushes, or remote operations may become environment-sensitive unless they isolate a temporary git repository and avoid network remotes.
The reported javac failure is an API signature change in GitTagCommand.createCommandLine, not a missing dependency or environment setup problem.

input_evidence.name: issue
input_evidence.summary: #8274 [Automation] javac compile fails for org.apache.maven.scm:maven-scm-provider-gitexe:1.11.1; label=fails-javac-compile; body_chars=8015
